title: The public surface is being rebuilt
summary: The website, catalogue, GitHub repository, and private publishing operation are being brought into one controlled workflow.
body: The objective is not more software for its own sake. The objective is to make public information match the actual books, editions, release states, and files without requiring an archaeological excavation every time one sentence changes.

title: Two fiction systems remain open
summary: Varden and the broken Andalusian mystery continue moving through structural revision.
body: One system asks for consent that cannot be remembered. The other begins with a shoe, a dog, and a door that ordinary life has agreed not to notice.

title: Entropy and Philosophy
summary: Two new circles turn the wider framework inward and downward.
body: Philosophy examines the structures built to make chaos interpretable. Entropy examines the energy bill required to keep any structure recognizable.
